input: descriptor datasets containing course and user requirement details
output: scored and ranked list of recommended courses
backbone: Hybrid Clustered Graph Neural Network (Clustering-based Graph Convolutional Representation + WordPieceFormer + Hybrid Clustered Recurrent Neural Network)
key_idea: combines clustering-based graph convolution for student recommendations, WordPieceFormer for contextual social media features, and a hybrid clustered RNN for scoring and ranking courses
